description: CompositionBlue and green check shirt made of blended cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned placket, embroidery on the left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash separately using mild detergentDo not dry clean, do not bleachDrip dryWarm ironImpeccable construction, attention to detail and smart stripes make this shirt from lee a wardrobe essential – wear with confidence tucked into denims or corduroy trousers.
